name: Car Capital INC.
description_short: Car Pawn of California offers vehicle collateral loans on cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, and jetskis across Southern California. Same-day funding with 35.9% APR and no prepayment penalties.
description_long:
Car Pawn of California is a vehicle-backed pawn lender serving Southern California with physical location(s) operating Monday-Friday 10am-5pm and Saturday 10am-2pm. The company specializes in collateral-based loans where customers pledge their vehicle as security for quick cash, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional credit for borrowers who may have bad credit or need emergency funds.

The company offers pawn loans on a wide range of vehicles including cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, and jetskis. Loan amounts start at $2,600 minimum with terms ranging from 12 to 48 months. They advertise competitive rates at 35.9047% APR (2.99% monthly) and claim same-day funding guarantees. The company also operates a used vehicle sales lot, selling inventory that includes luxury and standard vehicles ranging from a 1969 Pontiac Firebird to a 2010 Bentley Continental. Customers can apply online or call 1-888-500-9887 for quotes.

Key distinguishing factors include their focus on vehicle collateral across multiple asset types (not just cars), explicit marketing toward "bad credit" borrowers, claims of same-day cash disbursement, and a fully amortized loan structure where each payment reduces principal with no prepayment penalties. They also finance California-specific documentation fees and lien fees into the loan. The company positions itself competitively against "traditional lenders" on rate comparisons.

While the 35.9% APR is relatively lower than some payday lenders, it remains significantly higher than bank or credit union rates. The $15 California lien fee and $75 documentation fee add to total cost. Loan qualification requires a 690+ credit score, 2+ years employment history, and 3+ years at current address—criteria that may exclude some borrowers seeking emergency cash. The company's used vehicle inventory quality and pricing transparency are not detailed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No prepayment penalties — borrowers can pay off loans early without additional charges
Fully amortized loans where each payment reduces principal balance, not just interest
Same-day funding claimed for vehicle pawn loans (competitive advantage over slower lenders)
Wide range of accepted collateral including cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, and jetskis
Rates advertised at 35.9% APR stated as lower than competitors in their market
Simple online application process available in addition to phone and in-person options
Explicit transparency on loan terms with detailed amortization examples and fee disclosures
cons: 35.9% APR is still predatory-adjacent pricing, significantly higher than bank or credit union alternatives
Minimum loan of $2,600 excludes consumers needing smaller emergency amounts under $2,600
Qualification requires 690+ credit score, 2+ years employment, and 3+ years at current address — stricter than marketed 'bad credit' positioning suggests
Additional fees ($75 documentation + $15 California lien fee) increase true cost of borrowing beyond stated APR
Website lacks transparency on used vehicle pricing, quality control standards, and warranty/return policies
best_for: Vehicle owners with fair-to-good credit (690+) who need emergency cash and can secure it with collateral
Borrowers seeking larger loans ($2,600+) who want to avoid credit inquiries and traditional loan applications
Southern California residents who qualify and need same-day or rapid funding for medical bills, repairs, or unexpected expenses
Used vehicle buyers in Southern California looking for inventory from a local dealer
diagnosis: Car Pawn of California is best for Southern California vehicle owners with established credit (690+), stable employment, and residential history who need $2,600+ in emergency cash and can pledge a vehicle as collateral. The main caveat is that the 35.9% APR, while competitive within the pawn industry, is substantially higher than bank or credit union options and should only be pursued when traditional lending is unavailable or when speed is a critical priority.
services: Vehicle pawn loans secured by cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, and jetskis
In-person consultations at Southern California location
Fully amortized installment loan structures (12, 24, 36, or 48-month terms)
Vehicle title management and lien filing
Bad credit loan approvals (with credit score qualification requirements)
Competitive rate quotes relative to competitors
Documentation and California lien fee financing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4660 La Jolla Village Dr Suite 100, San Diego, CA 92122
meta_description: Car Pawn of California offers vehicle collateral loans across Southern California with same-day funding.
